message:
test(native): skip Dawn conformance when CI runner has no GPU adapter

GitHub Actions Windows runners are headless and don't expose a
D3D12-capable adapter to Dawn. The conformance test was failing at
backend init:

  Error: dawn: createBackend failed (no Dawn-compatible adapter,
  or required features missing — see stderr)

Conformance verifies kernel correctness on a real GPU; without an
adapter there's nothing to compare against, so failing the build
is wrong signal. Match the pattern we already use elsewhere in
the suite: detect "no adapter" and skip cleanly with a clear
message + exit 0.

Real-GPU dev machines (Windows D3D12, Mac Metal, Linux Vulkan with
real drivers) keep running the full conformance unchanged.
